description: A one-file greeting fix should stay in the root loop without delegation overhead.
task: Fix greet() so named greetings match README.md while preserving the documented empty-name fallback. Keep the change local and run the targeted test.
expected_contracts: The smallest cohesive source change restores named and fallback greetings.
A small local task does not trigger delegation.
forbidden_regressions: Do not edit or remove tests.
Do not broaden the change beyond src/greeting.mjs.
